emails.subject: Re: Plays and other information
emails.body: Re: Plays and other information suggestion... make a playbook that just shows individual routes.. that way Luis can just customize in the huddle.... Ex. outs, curls, out-and-up, post.. etc... also,, You give routes to the linemen and they should block and then roll out into the open flats once the defense goes past.... AND... most importantly.. how did you draw those plays excel....

emails.subject: Re: Plays and other information
emails.body: we will have a list of patterns just in case people don't know what they are, but the plays are designed to clear out areas so that certain patterns are more open. you can draw plays in excel using the drawing toolbar. what time are we going to scrimmage tomorrow? Michael Simmons 11/14/2000 03:37 PM

emails.subject: Re: Plays and other information
emails.body: Re: Plays and other information the scrimmage is still up in the air... webb said that they didnt want to scrimmage... the aggies are scrimmaging each other... (the aggie teams practiced on Sunday) when I called the aggie captains to see if we could use their field.... they said that it was tooo smalll for us to use... sounds like bullshit to me... but what can we do.... anyway... we will have to do another practice Wed. night.... and I dont' know where we can practice.... any suggestions... also, we still need one more person...
